name: The Synapse
subtitle: Where women connect mind, machine, and what comes next

fiscalSponsor.name: Fiscal sponsor TBD
fiscalSponsor.blurb: The fiscal sponsor shown here is a placeholder while the committee finalizes a 501(c)(3) partnership. The chosen sponsor will hold donated funds and issue tax-deductible receipts in its own name.

mission: The Synapse convenes women working at the edge of consciousness research, cognitive science, and machine intelligence. We gather to interrogate what these fields mean together -- not as a survey, but as a working conversation that gives early-career researchers a seat at the same table as senior scholars.
